Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Audience: Managers; IT / Service Desk; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Explain the three C-SCRM tracks (SCRM-DS for digital services, SCRM-S for software, SCRM-PS for professional services); understand that supplier risk is recorded in the Risk Register with POA&Ms

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Audience: Managers; IT / Service Desk; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Describe how suppliers are risk-tiered at intake: CIAX scoring for SaaS, security posture/SBOM for software, and access/criticality/regulatory scope for professional services; identify the three tiers (Low/Medium/High)

Module: F - Governance, risk, and compliance awareness
Learning Outcome: Understand that no supplier may be procured, deployed, or granted access until tier-appropriate due diligence is complete (intake form, evidence review, security questionnaire)

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Explain the SCRM-DS process: CIAX scoring, SSO/MFA validation, data region and encryption review, exit strategy, FedRAMP requirement for CUI; know that OAuth app registrations are monitored to detect unapproved services
Explain the SCRM-S process: SBOM required at intake, SCA in CI/CD feeding Dependency-Track, remediate Critical/High before release, replace unmaintained components (no updates >1 year)

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Explain the SCRM-PS process: partner criteria (legal review, background checks, certifications), CMMC level verification for FCI/CUI work, DFARS flow-down to sub-tier suppliers

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Audience: Managers; IT / Service Desk; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Identify the required contract clauses: confidentiality, least-privilege, encryption, MFA, incident reporting (within 24 hours), right to audit, federal flow-down (FAR/DFARS for FCI/CUI), change notification, exit/data destruction

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Audience: Managers; IT / Service Desk; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Describe the review cadence by tier: annual for Low/Medium, semi-annual for High SaaS; CI/CD-enforced SBOM refresh for software; annual PM-led review for professional services; identify ad-hoc triggers (incidents, scope changes, new data classes)

Treat FOSS libraries and containers as suppliers: require SBOMs, triage known vulnerabilities, verify license compliance, assess maintainer health; isolate or replace high-risk/unmaintained components

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Screen against the prohibited technology list and DFARS restrictions during intake and annual reviews

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Ensure partners use SSO where available, enforce MFA for admin access, prohibit shared accounts; scope and rotate non-person identities per CivicActions standards
Escalate supplier incidents or outages that may affect CivicActions data to Incident Response; follow shared responsibility model and contract SLAs for recovery

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Audience: Managers; IT / Service Desk; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Retain intake forms, tiering decisions, questionnaires, contract clauses, review results, POA&Ms, and exit attestations as Controlled Records
